hypothesis: If a diffusion model trained only on metastable-state data is guided by SBI-interpolated conditional scores during reverse diffusion and refined by SAA along the score-difference as an approximate reaction coordinate, then it will accurately sample transition states and transition pathways for 2D potentials, alanine dipeptide, chignolin, and a chemical reaction, yielding committor and energy-profile agreement with reference benchmarks and outperforming linear/geodesic interpolation baselines.
